tags.name: Air Wall
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Located on west/southwest side of Gili Air (existing markdown incorrectly said eastern side — corrected). Wall from 5-10m to 24-28m, gorgonian sea fans and bumphead parrotfish confirmed. Depth updated from 22m to 28m per Dive Central Gili (18m avg/28m max). Sources: trawanganstingraydivers.com, divezone.net, divecentralgili.com.

tags.name: Bounty
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Re-audited. Sinking date conflict across sources: Dive Central Gili and Trawangan Dive say 2001 storm; PADI says 'around 2003'; one source says 1999. Description updated to note conflict. Shallowest point: sources vary (6m per some, 8m per others, 9m per PADI). Location: OSM coordinate places it northwest of Gili Meno; multiple dive operators describe it as 'south-west' — conflict noted in markdown. Dimensions: ~30m long, 15m wide confirmed by multiple sources. Marine life: pygmy seahorses, frogfish, scorpionfish, angelfish, sweetlips confirmed. Bamboo sharks removed (not confirmed at this site). Sources: divecentralgili.com, trawangandive.com, padi.com.

tags.name: Deep Turbo
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Depth updated from 30m to 40m per divezone.net and trawangandive.com. Site type confirmed as pinnacle (coral pinnacles/sea mounds rising from sandy bottom). Northeast Gili Trawangan. Strong currents confirmed. Sources: trawanganstingraydivers.com, divezone.net, trawangandive.com.

tags.name: Frog Fish Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Site type updated from reef to muck — multiple sources describe as muck/macro dive site. Located east of Gili Air (harbour area also known as Gili Air Harbour). Frogfish (multiple species), seahorses, ghost pipefish, leaf scorpionfish, pipefish confirmed. Sources: scubago.com, diversiondivetravel.com.au, oceans5dive.com (Gili Air dive sites).

tags.name: Halik
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed northwest Gili Trawangan drift reef, 6-40m. Eagle rays, reef sharks, barrel sponges, anemone fields confirmed. Depth kept at 20m (shallow accessible section) but notes deep section to 40m. Note: Trawangan Wall site may overlap with Halik reef zone. Sources: trawangandive.com, gilidivers.com, divecentralgili.com.

tags.name: Jack Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Only 2 independent sources found (diversiadiving.wixsite.com, trawangandive.com). Cannot meet 3-source threshold. Confirmed northeast of Gili Trawangan, deep canyons to 24m+, schools of jacks/trevally/sharks, advanced/deep specialty site. Difficulty upgraded from Intermediate to Advanced per sources. Depth updated from 20m to 24m. Remains unvalidated pending 3rd independent source.

tags.name: Malang
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed as Takat Malang, north of Gili Islands. Rock formations (Takats) on sloping bed from 15m plateau to 40m. Gorgonian sea fans, blue-spotted stingrays, garden eels confirmed. Depth updated from placeholder to 40m max. Sources: gilidivers.com, trawangandive.com, starfish.ch.

tags.name: Manta Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed south coast of Gili Trawangan. Depth updated from 20m to 24m per sources (range 8-24m). Manta ray encounters seasonal (best March-May). Reef sharks, sweetlips, snappers, turtles confirmed. Site type drift confirmed (gentle current). Sources: lombok-dive.com, gilidivers.com, terumbudivers.com.

tags.name: Meno Corner
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Only one independent source found for this specific site name. Confirmed on Gili Meno (northeast tip per existing description). Cannot meet 3-source threshold. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Meno Slope
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Site confirmed as a sandy slope on Gili Meno. Two sources found (divessi.com, gilidivers.com) but not enough distinct independent dive-operator sources to meet 3-source threshold. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Meno Wall
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Wall confirmed on west side of Gili Meno (existing markdown incorrectly placed between Trawangan and Meno — corrected). Night dive quality confirmed. Marine life: moray eels, scorpionfish, lobsters, crabs, lionfish, groupers, turtles confirmed. Bamboo sharks removed — not confirmed by any source at this specific site. Pygmy seahorses mentioned at adjacent muck slope rather than the wall itself. Sources: padi.com (Gili Meno Wall), gilidivers.com, divecentralgili.com.

tags.name: Mirkos Reef
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed between Gili Air and Gili Meno. Deep ridges from 35m to 18m with table corals, sea fans, sponges. Fusiliers, snappers, blue-spotted stingrays, frogfish, whitetip reef sharks, turtles confirmed. Sources: scubago.com, manta-dive-giliair.com (Mirko's Reef page), gilis.asia.

tags.name: Shallow Turbo
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed northeast Gili Trawangan, sandy bottom with coral heads, 18m depth. Pufferfish, batfish, turtles, garden eels, ghost pipefish confirmed. Site type reef confirmed. Sources: trawanganstingraydivers.com, trawangandive.com, divessi.com.

tags.name: Shark Point
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed northwest Gili Trawangan. Glenn Nusa: old tugboat, intentionally scuttled Feb 2016, 22m long x 6m high x 7m wide, lies at 28m sandy bottom between Halik and Shark Point — confirmed by 3 sources. Blacktip/whitetip reef sharks, turtles, bumphead parrotfish, trevally confirmed. The existing wreck name 'Glenn Nusa' is confirmed. Sources: terumbudivers.com, divecentralgili.com, trawangandive.com.

tags.name: Simons Reef
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Depth updated from 30m to 40m per Dive Central Gili (avg 25m, max 40m). Confirmed north of Gili Islands, canyons, gorgonian fans, pygmy seahorses. Sea snakes mentioned by multiple sources — added to notes but not written as guaranteed sighting. Sources: trawangandive.com, divecentralgili.com, gilidivers.com.

tags.name: Segaluh
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: No independent sources found for this specific site name. Site appears on OSM only (from Diveschool Notice Board). Cannot validate without sources.

tags.name: Teluk NBoro
tags.note: source is Diveschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Site type updated from reef to muck — Teluk Nara/Naro area on Lombok's northwest coast is confirmed as a muck/critter dive site with silt bottom. One source confirms mimic octopus, blue-ringed octopus, frogfish, nudibranchs (Dive Central Gili muck diving page). Insufficient sources for full validation — only 1 distinct source found.

tags.name: Trawangan Wall
tags.note: source is Diverschool Notice Board - Location might have to be checked with a GPS
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Existing markdown claims this is 'also known as Halik Reef' — Halik is confirmed as northwest Gili Trawangan drift/wall site. Trawangan Wall and Halik appear to be overlapping or adjacent sites in the same reef zone. Only 2 sources found specifically referencing the Halik reef/wall zone. Cannot meet 3-source threshold as distinct site. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Lombok Dive
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: No independent sources found for a dive site specifically named 'Lombok Dive.' OSM source only. Cannot validate without sources.

tags.name: Vila Almarick Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Vila Almarick (Almarik) resort confirmed on east coast Gili Trawangan. Biorock program confirmed as world-scale project (180+ structures). Individual structure depths not independently published. Only 2 sources. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Bale Sampan Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Bale Sampan resort confirmed on east coast Gili Trawangan. Biorock structures confirmed including sampan-shaped and octopus-shaped frames in front of cafe. Only 2 sources. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Samba Vilas Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Samba Villas resort confirmed on east coast Gili Trawangan. Biorock installation confirmed in front of resort beach. Only 2 sources. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Trawangan Dive Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Trawangan Dive is a confirmed PADI 5-star centre on Gili Trawangan. Biorock specialty courses confirmed. Only 2 sources. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Gili Divers Biorock
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Gili Divers confirmed operator on Gili Trawangan and Gili Air. Biorock operations confirmed. Only 2 sources. Remains unvalidated.

tags.name: Turtle Point
tags.notes: QA 2026-06-11: Confirmed northeast Gili Trawangan, large underwater hill/pinnacle from 10m to 35m. Multiple turtle species confirmed. Site type updated from reef to pinnacle per multiple sources. Difficulty Beginner retained — upper sections at 10m accessible to beginners. Trawanganstingraydivers.com page for Shallow Turbo also covers Turtle Point as the same northeast area. Sources: trawanganstingraydivers.com, trawangandive.com, gilidivers.com.
